nasb.text: and brought his head on a platter, and gave it to the girl; and the girl gave it to her mother.

esv.text: and brought his head on a platter and gave it to the girl, and the girl gave it to her mother.

cnv.text: 把頭放在盤子上，拿來交給那女孩子，女孩子又交給她的母親。

ccb.text: 放在盘子里送给这女子，她又转送给她母亲。

csbs.text: 把他的头放在盘子上，端给女孩，女孩就把它交给了母亲。
